voices.ref_text: Hello! My name is Astra. Please keep sharing your screen; you may check it. Whenever you are ready, we can begin the interview.
Namaste! Mera naam Astra hai. Kripya apna drishya-patal saanjha rakhna jaari rakhiye, aap jaanch kar sakte hain. Jab bhi aap taiyar hon, hum sakshatkar aarambh kar sakte hain.
Pranam! Hamaar naam Astra ba. Kripya apna drishya-patal saanjha rakhe ke jaari rakhi, rauaa jaanch kar sakat bani. Jab rauaa taiyar ho jai, tab humni sakshatkar aarambh kar sakat bani.
Namaste! Hamaye naav Astra aahaay. Aap aapan drishya-patal saanjha rakhiha, aap dekh sakat thein. Jab aap taiyar hoi jaayen, tab hum sakshatkar aarambh kar sakat hain.
